name: songfor.me
tagline: Make them a birthday song they'll never forget.
description: Generate a personalized birthday song for someone you love — name, inside jokes, memories included. Delivered in minutes. Give them a song they'll actually remember.

examples.name: Nick
examples.subtitle: Slay Baddie
examples.context: He bought himself a motorcycle for his birthday. His girlfriend's nickname, the famous basement foosball table, and the carpet everyone jokes about — all in there.

examples.name: Paula
examples.subtitle: P's Birthday
examples.context: Family gathering. Pregnant at the time — plants, four cats, her dog, and her Pokémon collection all made the cut.

examples.name: Paula
examples.subtitle: Take the Crown
examples.context: Same gathering, different genre. Paula loves reggae. This one was written to match her actual playlist.

examples.name: Monica
examples.subtitle: Sunshine's Out
examples.context: Same party, different vibe. A second song for the same big night.

examples.name: Monica
examples.subtitle: Big 1-2
examples.context: Full party — family and friends. Her 12th birthday. The campfire sleepover out back made the second verse.

examples.name: Lincoln
examples.subtitle: Spidey Kicks
examples.context: Family vacation. Pokémon cards, Spiderman, his catchphrases. The kids still ask for it.

examples.name: Nora
examples.subtitle: Chi Chi's Jam
examples.context: Big house party. Lilo and Stitch, missing front teeth, and both her nicknames in the lyrics.

examples.name: Nora
examples.subtitle: Ooh Yeah
examples.context: Same party, second song. Different groove for the same celebration.
